hero.title: Jonathan Atton
hero.subtitle: Fullstack Developer
hero.text: President of Cani'Compet Alsace | Canicross & Triathlon athlete

about.title: About
about.p1: As a senior software developer, I am ready to bring immediate added value to your company. My multi-sector experience (banking, legal, GDPR, analysis laboratory, sports) allows me to understand and quickly adapt to various contexts. My technical expertise ensures the creation of software solutions capable of meeting the most complex challenges.
about.p2: Beyond code, I leverage my complementary skills in decision-making strategy, marketing, and project & team management to ensure integrated product lifecycle management.

backend.title: Back-end
backend.item2: .NET / C#: Microsoft ecosystem, WPF, Image analysis, AI.

frontend.title: Front-end
frontend.item1: Angular / Ionic: Modern web and mobile applications.

soft.title: Soft Skills
soft.item3: Adaptability: Ability to evolve in various contexts.

exp1.title: Senior Developer – TVH Consulting
exp1.desc: Integrator and developer specialized in Microsoft Dynamics solutions. Design and deployment of advanced business applications leveraging Canvas Apps and the flexibility of React to meet critical business management needs.

exp2.title: Creation of RacesConnect Platform
exp2.desc: Creation and promotion of mobile platforms RacesConnect and Canicompet. Registration management and timing.

exp3.title: Creation of CaniGPS Platform
exp3.desc: GPS tracking solution for dogs CaniGPS. Localization, virtual fences, sports activity tracking.

exp4.title: Senior Developer Eurofins
exp4.desc: R&D on automatic analysis by electron microscope. Automation, AI, ergonomics.

exp5.title: IT Manager ActeCil
exp5.desc: Infrastructure setup, SaaS tools (APM, CilApps), team management.

exp6.title: Developer Euro Information
exp6.desc: Web tools, statistics, multi-site CMS for Crédit Mutuel CIC.

project1.title: Son Espace Santé / Refuge / Éleveur
project1.desc: Complete health and administrative tracking solution for pet owners, shelters, and breeders.

project2.title: RacesConnect – Canicompet
project2.desc: Registration management and timing platforms for competitions. 20,000+ active users.

project3.title: RacesConnect Timing
project3.desc: Software to manage start lists and competition timing. Manual or automatic timing with chips.

project4.title: CaniClub Connect
project4.desc: Mobile application for dog clubs: member management, communication, shop.

project5.title: CaniGPS
project5.desc: Geolocation and activity tracking platform for dogs.

sports.title: Sports
sports.p1: An accomplished and passionate athlete, I regularly practice canicross, bikejorning, triathlon, and Xterra. I have participated in several French, European, and World championships.
sports.p2: This discipline brings me resilience and the ability to achieve ambitious goals. I am also president of the Cani’Compet Alsace club and organizer of the Benfeld Canicross.
